---
title: "Managers"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from _common import get_conn, resolve_quarter
conn = get_conn()
period = resolve_quarter(conn)  # THIRTEEN_F_QUARTER 환경변수 사용
managers = conn.execute("SELECT cik, label, name, fund, style FROM managers ORDER BY label").fetchdf()
managers
```

각 거장의 분기 변화 요약:

```{python}
#| echo: false
df = conn.execute(
    """
    SELECT mn.label, s.change_type, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM signals_quarterly s
    JOIN managers mn ON mn.cik = s.cik
    WHERE s.period_of_report = ?
    GROUP BY mn.label, s.change_type
    """,
    (period,),
).fetchdf()
df.pivot_table(index="label", columns="change_type", values="n", fill_value=0)
```
